title: Monterey Jack and Pastry Quiche
description: A twist on traditional quiche, this recipe combines the creaminess of Monterey Jack cheese with the flaky crust of Ukrainian pastry.
instructions: Roll out the pastry sheet to fit a 9-inch pie dish.
In a bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, salt, and 1 cup of Monterey Jack cheese.
Pour the egg mixture into the pie crust.
Top with the remaining 1/2 cup of Monterey Jack cheese and shredded cheese.
Place the pie dish on the middle rack of the preheated broiler.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the quiche is set.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
